name: PandaDoc
description: PandaDoc is a document automation platform for creating, sending, tracking, and e-signing proposals, contracts, and quotes. It provides a REST API for programmatic document lifecycle management including template-based generation, recipient management, and legally-binding electronic signatures.

capabilities.name: create_document
capabilities.description: Create a new document from a template or from scratch, specifying recipients, tokens, fields, and metadata.

capabilities.name: send_document
capabilities.description: Send a completed document to its recipients for review and signature via email.

capabilities.name: get_document_status
capabilities.description: Retrieve the current status and details of a document including its completion progress, recipient activity, and metadata.

capabilities.name: list_documents
capabilities.description: List all documents in your account with optional filtering by status, template, folder, or date range.

capabilities.name: list_templates
capabilities.description: Retrieve all available document templates that can be used to create new documents.

capabilities.name: download_document
capabilities.description: Download a completed and signed document as a PDF file.

capabilities.name: create_document_link
capabilities.description: Generate a shareable link for a document so recipients can view and sign it without needing an email invitation.
